mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in retail sales signals resilient household demand and stronger near-term revenue expectations, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the sales trend improves.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value for 2024-01-01 was 700291.0 as of the 2024-02-15 decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if walk-forward tests show nonpositive 20-day return spreads between high and low 3-month RSAFS growth states in more than 60% of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When policy rates are high and consumer prices are still rising, equity discount rates remain restrictive and valuation multiples compress, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value for 2024-01-01 was 5.33 as of the 2024-02-15 decision snapshot
regime_hint: restrictive monetary policy with positive inflation momentum
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more than 60% of the time and no negative mean return differential versus untriggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in unemployment signals weakening labor income and rising recession probability, reducing expected earnings and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value for 2024-01-01 was 3.7 as of the 2024-02-15 decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if after the trigger, 60-day S&P 500 forward returns are positive in more than 55% of cases and the average triggered return is not below the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: Positive industrial production momentum signals improving real output and operating leverage for cyclical firms, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as production accelerates.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value for 2024-01-01 was 102.5739 as of the 2024-02-15 decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if the slope coefficient on 3-month INDPRO growth is negative in walk-forward return regressions or its rank IC stays below 0.03 for any rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future construction activity, depressing cyclical earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value for 2023-12-01 was 1460.0 as of the 2024-02-15 decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if year-over-year HOUST contraction triggers are followed by 60-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional mean in more than 60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Falling inflation while the policy rate is elevated increases expected future easing and lowers equity discount-rate pressure, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation rate declines versus prior 3 months and FEDFUNDS > 4.5
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value for 2024-01-01 was 309.685 as of the 2024-02-15 decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if this joint condition produces a negative average 20-day forward return or the triggered hit rate is below the unconditional positive-return rate by more than 5 percentage points.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth with low unemployment signals resilient labor income without immediate recession stress, supporting consumption expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases > 150 thousand over 1 month and UNRATE <= 4.0
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value for 2024-01-01 was 157700.0 as of the 2024-02-15 decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations do not have a higher 5-day positive-return frequency than the unconditional sample or if their mean excess return is negative.

mechanism_narrative: Strong real GDP growth combined with a rising federal funds rate signals demand strength that provokes tighter policy, and the valuation drag dominates earnings gains, producing negative 60-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth > 0.5% and FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 vintage value for 2023-10-01 was 22672.859 as of the 2024-02-15 decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or by returns not below matched strong-GDPC1 periods without FEDFUNDS increases.
